mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ACCOUNT_CATEGORY ( CATEGORY_ID, MEMBER_ID, CATEGORY_NAME, TYPE, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_ACCOUNT_CATEGORY.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{categoryName}, #{type}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT CATEGORY_ID, MEMBER_ID, CATEGORY_NAME, TYPE, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CREATED_AT FROM ACCOUNT_CATEGORY WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY CATEGORY_ID DESC
SELECT CATEGORY_ID, MEMBER_ID, CATEGORY_NAME, TYPE, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CREATED_AT FROM ACCOUNT_CATEGORY WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND TYPE = #{type}
